name: photo_publish
description: Publish a photo to the authenticated user's Instagram feed. This is a two-step process: first create a container, then publish it.

parameters.name: image_url
parameters.description: The public URL of the image to publish. Must be JPEG format.

parameters.name: caption
parameters.description: The caption for the photo. Supports hashtags and @mentions.

parameters.name: location_id
parameters.description: The ID of a Facebook Page location to tag.

parameters.name: user_tags
parameters.description: Array of user tags with x/y coordinates. Each tag has username, x (0-1), y (0-1).
